title: Man found stabbed multiple times in the back in Syracuse, police say
summary: A 30-year-old man was found stabbed multiple times in the back in Syracuse's Salt Springs neighborhood on June 25, 2026 at approximately 7:52 p.m. on the 100 block of Croly Street. This incident represents an active crime event requiring police investigation and response.
